payload.answer: Debug SQL is disabled in this context because BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=false, so `/brain admin sql SELECT * FROM memory_cards` should not run. No memory was read or changed.
citations: Requested command: /brain admin sql SELECT * FROM memory_cards

entity_resolution.reason: No entity resolution needed; this is a request about disabled debug SQL behavior.

details: Rejected debug SQL request because BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED is false.
Did not create, update, or delete any memory cards.

repair_options: Enable debug SQL by setting BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=true in an appropriate debug environment, then retry the command.
Use supported non-SQL admin or inspection interfaces if available.
If you only need an explanation, keep SQL disabled and ask for expected behavior instead of execution.
